name: REM — Memory Sweep
description: Periodic memory consolidation for agent sessions. Like REM sleep — replays the day and decides what to keep.

activeWindowMs.description: Only sweep sessions active within this window (default: 2h)

idleCooldownMs.description: Session must be idle for this long before sweeping (default: 5m, min: 1m)

maxSessionsPerTick.description: Max sessions to sweep per interval

memoryPath.description: Directory for memory files relative to workspace

journalPath.description: Directory for journal files relative to workspace

reflection.description: Enable reflection mode — also prompt for journal entries (opt-in)

intervalMs.label: Sweep interval (ms)
intervalMs.help: How often to check for sessions needing memory flush

activeWindowMs.label: Active window (ms)
activeWindowMs.help: Only sweep sessions with activity in this window

idleCooldownMs.label: Idle cooldown (ms)
idleCooldownMs.help: Session must be idle this long before sweeping

reflection.label: Reflection mode
reflection.help: Also prompt for journal/emotional entries (companion mode)
